failure_asset.hypothesis_tested: fold-local train-only path-quality and adverse-path state archetype membership with abstention-first US100 M5 schedule replay
failure_asset.next_boundary: next C0004 work must change a meaningful state-archetype, feature, label, model, or trade-shape surface; do not retry R0002 by only nudging path-quality label weights, top archetype count, min archetype count, daily max entries, stop, target, hold, or session thresholds
failure_asset.reason_not_candidate: fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence completed with 8 losing folds, 1 profitable fold, negative total tick net PnL, below-target proxy entries per active day, and negative proxy PnL

supporting_lessons.summary: Closed-bar schedule replay parity passed, while tick execution worsened total net PnL by 4.00 versus logic and reduced trade count by 3; tick execution remains the economic surface.
Path-quality state archetype labels reduced total tick loss versus R0001 but failed the target activity range and still lost 8 of 9 fold-isolated tick folds.

hypothesis_variant.summary: test whether fold-local state archetypes become more useful when train-only labels and state keys penalize adverse excursion and unstable prior path behavior before schedule replay
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: second C0004 true variant; changes the label, feature, model-score interpretation, and entry-quality surface from simple state archetype membership to path-quality-aware state archetype filtering; not a top-archetype-count, min-count, daily-entry, stop, target, hold, session, or retry nudge from R0001

notes: closed-bar MT5 mode is required for proxy-vs-EA logic parity
tick-mode MT5 is required for execution KPI management
fold-isolated MT5 tick and execution divergence are required before closeout
weak proxy evidence cannot skip MT5 validation
proxy must fit labels and archetype quality only inside each rolling train window
proxy result cannot decide whether MT5 validation is attempted
proxy must record path-quality and state-archetype diagnostics without creating selected claims
mechanical parity must compare scheduled entries, directions, exits, exit reasons, and position lifecycle behavior
tick-vs-closed-bar differences are execution divergence, not automatic logic failure
repair mechanical parity before any hypothesis judgment when mismatch is found

feature.summary: closed-bar archetype features augmented with prior adverse pressure, path smoothness, and directional follow-through buckets; no feature set is selected

label.summary: forward path-quality labels penalizing early adverse excursion and unstable path behavior while rewarding favorable excursion and terminal follow-through; no label is selected

model.summary: train-fold-local path-quality-aware archetype membership and edge score; no model family, objective, threshold, or score surface is selected

trade_logic.summary: fixed-lot discovery schedule enters only when train-fold-local path-quality archetype evidence survives abstention-first daily selection, then uses schedule replay for MT5 validation
